data.title: WorkWave introduces WAIve™ AI optimization for mobile service companies, transforming field operations. HOLMDEL, N.J., Jan. 27, 2026. #AI #FieldService
data.description: WorkWave®, a prominent software provider aiding mobile service companies in thriving, has introduced WAIve. WAIve leverages AI technology and extensive industry expertise to develop a hybrid workforce. This innovative offering aims to enhance the efficiency of mobile service businesses. The announcement was made on January 27, 2026, in Holmdel, New Jersey.

data.title: IsoEnergy closes C$57.5M bought deal financing Jan 27, 2026. Stock symbols: NYSE American: ISOU, TSX: ISO.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Toronto, IsoEnergy Ltd. (NYSE American: ISOU) (TSX: ISO) successfully completed its bought deal financing. The company did not disclose the exact amount of the deal.

data.title: Tyler Technologies sets Q4 2025 earnings discussion on Feb 12, 2026 in Plano, Texas. Call and webcast scheduled.
data.description: Tyler Technologies, based in Plano, Texas, will be hosting a conference call and webcast on February 12, 2026, to review the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company is known for its software solutions and services and is listed under the ticker symbol TYL. This event will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into Tyler Technologies' performance during this crucial period.

data.title: ECD Autodesign presents Project Belltown, an 800-horsepower Range Rover Classic reminiscent of ‘80s station wagons.
data.description: Belltown Project is showcasing a modified long-wheelbase Range Rover Classic that evokes nostalgia for the personal, mechanical driving experiences of the past.

data.title: ASIC in Australia lists crypto as a potential risk in regulatory perimeter with AI and payments in 2026, targeting firms in licensing gray areas.
data.description: The securities regulator of Australia has grouped digital assets alongside artificial intelligence and payments in its outlook for 2026. The regulator emphasized that addressing firms operating in licensing gray areas will be a key focus for the year ahead.

data.title: Dow falls before Fed meeting; UnitedHealth stock plunges on Medicare news. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a drop in the stock market in anticipation of the Federal Reserve's policy meeting. Specifically, UnitedHealth stock took a significant hit following news related to Medicare. This decline in the Dow Jones index reflects the cautious sentiment prevalent among investors in the current market. It is essential for investors to monitor updates from the Federal Reserve meeting and the ongoing developments in the healthcare sector. Stay tuned for further updates on this dynamic market situation.

data.title: JETSET Pilates opens new studio in Woodcliff Lake, NJ, expanding brand's reach in New Jersey - PRNewswire 1/27/2026.
data.description: Expanding its presence in New Jersey, a new studio has been opened by JETSET Pilates in Woodcliff Lake. The franchise, known for its customizable and modern Reformer Pilates classes, aims to bring premium full-body workouts to more communities. This development comes as part of the brand's growth strategy to cater to a wider audience. The new studio is set to serve as a hub for fitness enthusiasts in the area, offering a contemporary approach to Pilates. The expansion is aligned with the brand's mission to make high-quality fitness experiences accessible, with the aim of reaching a larger number of individuals seeking a unique workout experience.

data.title: Octane introduces Captive-as-a-Service for auto dealerships, offering full captive benefits without building from scratch.
data.description: The Captive-as-a-Service by Octane is a complete solution for automotive dealer groups, providing the advantages of owning a captive without the need to invest the time and money in developing one independently. This service combines technology, underwriting, loan processing, servicing, compliance, and capital for dealer groups, offering a streamlined approach. This allows automotive dealer groups to benefit from captive ownership while saving on costs and resources.

data.title: Marriott Vacations Corp (NYSE: VAC) to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 25 after market close; conference call on Feb 26 at 8am ET.
data.description: Orlando-based Marriott Vacations Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: VAC) is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 post-market closing on Wednesday, February 25. A conference call is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, February 26, for a detailed discussion on the results. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing (877) 407-8289 or (201) 689-8341 for international participants. Additionally, a live webcast of the call can be accessed in the Investor Relations segment of the Company's website.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US introduces latest heat pump tech at AHR Expo 2026 in Las Vegas.
data.description: Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US LLC (METUS) is set to showcase a range of new and expanded solutions at the AHR Expo 2026 held from February 2 to 4 at the Las Vegas Convention Center in Suwanee, Georgia.

data.title: Dave Mowat becomes board chair as KV Capital launches building products platform BP Holdings in Western Canada.
data.description: A new building products platform company, BP Holdings, has been launched by KV Capital in Edmonton, Alberta. Dave Mowat, former President and CEO of ATB Financial, will chair the board. This strategic move by KV Capital is in response to market demands from builders and developers. BP Holdings will consolidate previously separate companies into a unified supplier for Western Canada. This marks a significant development for KV Capital's building products portfolio.

data.title: The Stonewall Group acquires ADG Architecture, a Fort Myers firm founded in 1990, known for design excellence.
data.description: LAFAYETTE, La--The Stonewall Group, a company specializing in acquiring and operating top architecture firms in the U.S., has acquired ADG Architecture, LLC based in Fort Myers, Florida. Known for its excellence in architectural design, planning, and interior design, ADG Architecture was established in 1990 by Bob Taylor and Clarisa Parodi. The firm, with over 30 years of experience, has been pivotal in shaping the built environment.

data.title: WOWorks sees successful growth in 2026, parent of six healthy brands, focuses on franchise expansion and menu creativity.
data.description: A parent company overseeing six health-focused restaurant brands has utilized co-branding and innovative menu offerings to boost franchise growth. WOWorks, based in St. Petersburg, Florida, has seen success with brands like Saladworks, Frutta Bowls, and Garbanzo Mediterranean. The company's strategy has led to significant franchise expansion, setting a trend for growth within the industry. The approach has resulted in a surge of new franchise opportunities and market reach for WOWorks, positioning them as a key player in the competitive restaurant market. This has solidified their position in the industry, attracting both investors and health-conscious consumers alike.

data.title: INDUS Realty Trust, Inc. reports a 24.1% rise in portfolio size to 15.5 million sq ft in 2025, with 81 properties.
data.description: In New York, INDUS Realty Trust, Inc., a logistics real estate company based in the U.S., shared an update on its acquisitions, development, and leasing progress for the years 2025 and 2026 so far. Currently, INDUS holds or has majority stakes in 81 properties, totaling 15.5 million square feet. This marks a significant 24.1% expansion in the company's portfolio since the beginning of 2025 and an impressive 113.7% growth since its acquisition in 2023. Notably, INDUS acquired 5 properties in this period.

data.title: Cambodia's construction industry expected to see 6.6% growth in 2026 with a 5.2% increase in 2025, driven by new projects and credit.
data.description: A report on the Cambodia Construction Market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, indicating a predicted annual growth rate of 5.2% in 2025 and 6.6% in 2026 in real terms. The industry is segmented into Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential sectors. This growth is attributed to a rise in new construction project approvals.

data.title: ReelTime Media reduces outstanding debt by half, total debt cut by over 64% in a year, focusing on debt reduction.
data.description: Nvidia, Oracle, AMD, Alphabet, and Microsoft are increasing their leverage to finance AI infrastructure. In contrast, ReelTime is focusing on reducing debt and transforming its balance sheet. The former companies are investing heavily in AI infrastructure, while the latter is prioritizing financial discipline and reducing debt. This highlights two different approaches in the industry.
